creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
(In reply to Marián Černý from comment #5)
>     rm -Rf /usr/ports/distfiles

Perhaps this is overkill.

    rm -rf /usr/ports/distfiles/go/devel_gitaly

is sufficient for deve/gitaly (${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR} for each port which has go-post-fetch make target, i.e. devel/gitaly, devel/gitlab-shell, textproc/gitlab-elasticsearch-indexer, www/gitlab-workhorse).
